content.cn_text: 女:嗯……我有兴趣为图书馆做些工作——我可以找你谈谈吗?
content.en_text: Woman: Hmm .. I'm interested in doing some work for the library - are you the person to speak to?

content.cn_text: 图书管理员:是的，好的，嗯，你对什么样的工作感兴趣?
content.en_text: Librarian: Yes Right, well, erm, what sort of work are you interested in?

content.cn_text: 女:我刚来澳大利亚住，在孩子们安定下来之前，我不想找一份全职工作，但我真的需要出去走走，我听说你们需要各种项目的志愿者……
content.en_text: Woman: I've just come to live here in Australia I don't want a full-time job until my children have settled down, but t really need to get out of the house a bit, and l heard you need Example voluntary workers for various projects...

content.cn_text: 图书管理员:对的。
content.en_text: Librarian: Right.

content.cn_text: 女:但我不知道我是否有合适的技能。
content.en_text: Woman: but I don't know if I have the right skills.

content.cn_text: 图书管理员:嗯，我们提供培训
content.en_text: Librarian: Well, we do provide training

content.cn_text: 女人:哦。
content.en_text: Woman: Oh.

content.cn_text: 图书管理员:我们总是会介绍图书馆的情况，以及应急程序，包括消防条例、紧急出口和急救。所以你可以应付意外事故或突发疾病，这对任何一个与公众打交道的人来说都是必要的。然后，我们为特定项目提供专业培训——比如使用我们的数据库系统。
content.en_text: Librarian: We always include an orientation to the library, together with emergency procedures, that's fire regulations, emergency exits, first aid. So you can cope with accidents or sudden illness, things like that which are necessary for anyone who's working with the public. Then we give specialist training for particular projects - like using our database system.

content.cn_text: 女:事实上，我确实有很好的计算机技能。
content.en_text: Woman: I do have quite good computer skills, in fact.

content.cn_text: 图书管理员:嗯，太好了!
content.en_text: Librarian: Umm Great!

content.cn_text: 女:有什么着装要求吗?
content.en_text: Woman: Is there any sort of dress requirement?

content.cn_text: 图书管理员:嗯，所有的员工都必须佩戴名牌，这样当他们走出“员工专用”区域时就能被认出来。但除此之外，没有太多的规定——我们要求你签到和签到是出于保险的目的，但仅此而已。交通怎么样，你住在当地吗?
content.en_text: Librarian: Well, all staff have to wear a name badge so they can be identified if they go outside the 'staff only' areas. But apart from that there aren't many regulations - we ask you to sign in and sign out for insurance purposes, but that's all. How about transport do you live locally?

content.cn_text: 女:不太远，我在海豚海滩。我丈夫白天需要用车，但坐公共汽车只要20分钟。
content.en_text: Woman: Not too far away I'm at Porpoise Beach. My husband needs the car during the day but it's only about twenty minutes on the bus.

content.cn_text: 图书管理员:事实上，如果是这样的话，我们可以报销你的部分旅费。
content.en_text: Librarian: In fact, we can reimburse part of your travel expenses in that case.

content.cn_text: 女:哦，如果我开车来也一样吗?
content.en_text: Woman: Oh Would that be the same if I came by car?

content.cn_text: 图书管理员:不，因为在这里停车是个问题。不过我们要找的是会开小巴的人。
content.en_text: Librarian: No, because parking is such a problem here. One thing we are looking for though is someone who can drive a minibus.

content.cn_text: 女:没问题。这些项目涉及到图书馆以外的地方吗?
content.en_text: Woman: No problem So. do the projects involve going outside the library?

content.cn_text: 图书管理员:有的，是的。但并非全部如此。我们刚刚完成了一项工作，其中涉及到50或100年前拍摄的该地区的照片，基本上涉及到我们所说的封装……
content.en_text: Librarian: Some, yes. But not all. We've just finished one which involved working with photographs taken of the area 50 or 100 years ago it basically involved what we call encapsulation ..

content.cn_text: 女:把它们放在某种盖子里以保证它们的安全?
content.en_text: Woman: Putting them in some sort of covers to keep them safe?

content.cn_text: 图书管理员:没错，这是一项耗时的工作，我们非常感谢你的帮助。然后，明年的某个时候，我们希望开始一项倡议，包括对与当地历史有关的物品进行分类和标记。我们需要人帮忙编目。
content.en_text: Librarian: Exactly, it's time-consuming work, and we were very grateful to have help with it. Then, sometime next year we're hoping to begin working on an initiative involving the sorting and labelling of objects relating to local history. We'll be needing help with the cataloguing.

content.cn_text: 女:我肯定有兴趣。现在怎么样?
content.en_text: Woman: I'd definitely be interested. How about at present?

content.cn_text: 图书管理员:嗯，我们有一个小团队致力于帮助那些不能阅读的人。
content.en_text: Librarian: Well, we have a small team who work to support those who are unable to read.

content.cn_text: 女:帮助盲人。
content.en_text: Woman: Working with the blind.

content.cn_text: 图书管理员:是的，或者其他有阅读困难的群体。我们为志愿者提供设备，这样他们就可以把书带回家，并把它们读到cd上。我们正在逐渐建立一个可以借给需要的人的收藏
content.en_text: Librarian: Yes, or other groups who have reading difficulties. We provide volunteers with equipment so that they can take books home with them and read them aloud onto CDs. We're gradually building up a collection that can be lent to those who need them

content.cn_text: 女:嗯。我知道这很有用，但我真的很想做一些能有机会认识人的工作。给孩子们读故事怎么样?
content.en_text: Woman: Mmm. I can see it would be useful, but I'd really like to do some sort of work where I can get the chance to meet people. How about reading stories to children?

content.cn_text: 图书管理员:嗯。这是由我们的正式员工完成的。但我们确实有另一个项目——这是一个建立已久的计划，旨在帮助那些无法直接进入图书馆的人。
content.en_text: Librarian: Mmm. That's done by our regular staff. But we do have another project - it's a very long established scheme which involves helping those who are unable to have direct access to the library.

content.cn_text: 女人:哦。上周我在医院的时候，我注意到有人推着一手推车书。诸如此类的事情?
content.en_text: Woman: Oh. I noticed someone with a trolley of books when i was at the hospital last week. That sort of thing?

content.cn_text: 图书管理员:是的，那应该是我们的一个。这是我们最受欢迎的服务之一——很多人平时在家的时候不会想到去图书馆借书，但当手推车绕过病房时，他们就借书了。
content.en_text: Librarian: That would have been one of ours, yes. It's one of our most popular services -lots of people who wouldn't dream of going to the library normally, when they're at home,borrow a book when the trolley comes round the ward.

content.cn_text: 女:我可以想象。是的，我非常感兴趣。好吧，那我怎么注册呢?
content.en_text: Woman: I can imagine. Yes, I'd definitely be interested in that. Right, so how do I enroll?

content.cn_text: 图书管理员:嗯，我们确实要求所有的志愿者承诺每周有固定的时间。
content.en_text: Librarian: Well, we do ask all volunteers to commit themselves to a regular period each week.

content.cn_text: 女:我大概可以做五到六个小时。
content.en_text: Woman: I could probably do five or six hours.

content.cn_text: 图书管理员:哦……注意不要接太多的活儿——但是我们确实需要几个下午两点到四点的人……一共四个小时。
content.en_text: Librarian: Oh ... be careful not to take on too much - but we do need someone for a couple of afternoons from 2 to 4 ... so four hours altogether.

content.cn_text: 女:听起来不错。
content.en_text: Woman: That sounds fine.

content.cn_text: 图书管理员:好的，这是申请表……它会问一些常见的问题，姓名、地址和电话号码。你还需要填写在发生事故或类似问题时我们应该联系谁的详细信息，我们确实需要填写这些，还有出生日期一栏，但这只适用于超过75岁的人。我们不担心这个。
content.en_text: Librarian: Right, so here's the application form . .. it asks the usual questions, name and address and telephone number. You also need to fill in details of who we should get in touch with in case of any accident or problem like that, we do need to have that filled in,and there's a space for date of birth, but that's only if you're over 75 so. we won't worry about that.

content.cn_text: 女:没有。哦。它要求资格，我需要提供证书吗?
content.en_text: Woman: No. Oh. it asks for qualifications do I need to provide certificates?

content.cn_text: 图书管理员:没有必要。我们需要两名推荐人的名字显然不是亲戚或家庭成员的名字。还有什么…父母或监护人的签名——我猜你已经18岁了，不需要了吧?
content.en_text: Librarian: They're not necessary. We'll need the names of two referees not relatives or family members, obviously. What else . . signature of parent or guardian - that won't be necessary as i assume you're over 18?

content.cn_text: 女人:是的。这是什么?上面写着“民事定罪检查”
content.en_text: Woman: Yes. What's this? it says 'civil conviction check'

content.cn_text: 图书管理员:根据法律，我们必须为那些从事涉及儿童的项目的人提供这份文件，所以你的情况下我们不需要。但你需要签署一份单独的文件，这是一份承诺的副本，基本上是一份根据图书馆指导方针工作的协议。如果你想把这些都填上，你可以在这里填，也可以带回家，随便你怎么填。
content.en_text: Librarian: That's a document we have to provide by law for those working on projects involving children, so we' won't need it in your case. But you will need to sign this separate document that's a copy of commitment, it's basically an agreement to work according to the library guidelines. So if you'd like to fill this all in - you can do it here, or take it home, whichever you prefer.

content.cn_text: 女:如果可以的话，我把它带回家。好的，谢谢你的时间……
content.en_text: Woman: I'll take it home if that's OK. Right, well thank you for your time ...

groups.desc:
Questions 1-7
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

items.title: The librarian says that training always includes
items.analysis: 文中明确指出图书馆的培训"always include"（总是包括）紧急程序，其中特别提到了"first aid"（急救）。这直接对应了选项B中的"basic medical skills"（基本医疗技能）。此外，培训内容还包括如何应对事故和突发疾病，这进一步强调了基本医疗技能的重要性。因此，B选项是正确答案。

items.title: All library service volunteers have to
items.analysis: 文中明确指出，图书馆对志愿者的主要要求是签到签出（sign in and sign out）。这是出于保险目的的强制性要求，并且原文强调"that's all"，表明这是唯一的必须遵守的规定。因此，A选项"record their arrival and departure"（记录他们的到达和离开）正确地概括了这一要求。

items.title: The woman would be entitled to a contribution towards the cost of
items.analysis: 文中提到女士住在Porpoise Beach，可以乘坐大约20分钟的公共汽车到达。图书馆员随后表示可以报销部分交通费用。这明确指出了女士有资格获得公共交通费用的部分报销。虽然文中提到了小巴和停车，但这些并不是图书馆会报销的费用。因此，正确答案是公共交通，因为这是唯一一个图书馆明确表示会提供报销的交通方式。

items.title: One recent library project involved
items.analysis: 文中明确提到"We've just finished"，表明这是一个最近完成的图书馆项目。该项目涉及处理旧照片，并使用了"encapsulation"（封装）这个术语，这与选项B中的"protecting historical photographs"（保护历史照片）直接对应。因此，B选项是正确答案。

items.title: At present, the library is looking for people to
items.analysis: 文中明确提到图书馆目前正在进行的项目是让志愿者将书籍朗读并录制到CD上。这个项目旨在帮助那些无法阅读的人，包括但不限于盲人。因此，选项A "record books onto CD"最准确地描述了图书馆当前正在寻找人手进行的工作。

items.title: The woman says she is interested in a project involving

options.title: A
options.content: taking library books to people in hospital.

options.title: B
options.content: delivering library books to people at home.

options.title: C
options.content: driving the disabled to the library.

items.analysis: 文中提到图书馆有一项服务是使用书车在医院病房中为病人提供图书。这项服务被描述为非常受欢迎，许多平时不会去图书馆的人在住院期间会借阅这些书。这明确对应了选项A "taking library books to people in hospital"，因此A是正确答案。

items.title: The woman agrees to work for
items.analysis: 文中图书馆员明确提出了工作时间的建议，即"a couple of afternoons from 2 to 4 ... so four hours altogether"。这个表述直接给出了每周工作时间为4小时，与选项B完全吻合。虽然女士最初提到可能工作5-6小时，但图书馆员的建议是最终确定的工作时间，因此正确答案是B选项。

groups.title: Which THREE of the following must be provided by all volunteers?

collect_options.title: Which THREE of the following must be provided by all volunteers?

items.analysis: 根据听力材料，所有志愿者必须提供的三项内容是：签署承诺书（B选项），提供紧急联系信息（D选项），以及提供两个推荐人的名字（G选项）。这三项内容在对话中被明确指出是必需的，使用了"need to"，"do need to"和"We'll need"等表示必要性的词语。其他选项要么被明确说明不需要，要么只适用于特定情况。
根据听力材料，所有志愿者必须提供的三项内容是：签署承诺书（B选项），提供紧急联系信息（D选项），以及提供两个推荐人的名字（G选项）。这三项内容在对话中被明确指出是必需的，使用了"need to"，"do need to"和"We'll need"等表示必要性的词语。其他选项要么被明确说明不需要，要么只适用于特定情况。
根据听力材料，所有志愿者必须提供的三项内容是：签署承诺书（B选项），提供紧急联系信息（D选项），以及提供两个推荐人的名字（G选项）。这三项内容在对话中被明确指出是必需的，使用了"need to"，"do need to"和"We'll need"等表示必要性的词语。其他选项要么被明确说明不需要，要么只适用于特定情况。
